title: Sanji Faces the Vinsmokes
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Big Mom, Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Cracker as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Sanji is forced back into the Vinsmoke family’s control, revealing the cruelty behind his royal bloodline.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fine, whatever.... first things first ....We'll start with this loose-lipped Bafoon here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mama said she wouldn't lose any sleep if you had an 'accident'...

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: What-?! Linlin said that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well then, let this fact sink in! I mean, I could very well be your father!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Perhaps... you were my "original"... but you're not mine now!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: According to Mama, her previous 43 husbands...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are just random group of "outsiders" with no blood relation what- soever....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No... I'm begging you... What about my daughters ...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm related to them!! They're my flesh and blood!! Please, don't!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Someone who is

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Is this... pity? Compassion?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: pant... pant...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Fank- Youuuuuuuuu... Thfaaank- Youuuu .....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You've known him for so long,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And yet you act like you don't feel a thing for him!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Holy crap!!! This is not going to end well!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: GyaA AAAAA AA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Cracker's about to open up a huge can of whoop ass right here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We've gotta go now. Whats your name?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My name is "pound." Just a while ago, you said the name "Lola," did you not?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: where do you think you're run- ning off to, "Homes"?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Grab them!! Capture them!! Do not let them get away!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As long as it's in that direction, it won't be a problem!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: RAAAAAMRR!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hang on a second... Ummm.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Here it is!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What is? This?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is my friend Lola's mom's Vivre card.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I can't say for certain if that means it's big mom's or not...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What the hell is going on here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What's Wrong With You Guys?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm talking to you too, King Baun?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That said

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're sorry, BRILEe ....!! We homies cannot oppose that girl-ju!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: We can sense it... Mama's powerful soul-ju....!!!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 36 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
